TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Spottiswoode_Aitken, title = Spottiswoode_Aitken, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spottiswoode_Aitken} }

S.FORM: Spottiswoode Aitken kawas tay 1868, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Spottiswoode Aitken, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1933) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Spottiswoode Aitken kawas tay 1868, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Spottiswoode Aitken, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1933) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: s~ɕpottis~ɕwoo*e aitken kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕpottis~ɕwoo*e aitken, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
